  "findings": [
    "No spotter present while equipment backing near open trench",
    "Backing operation near trench edge without designated signal person creating struck-by and trench-collapse hazard"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt backing operation immediately",
    "Assign a trained spotter wearing high-visibility vest before resuming any backing movement",
    "Verify trench edge setback and equipment exclusion zone are maintained per site safety plan",
    "Brief operator and crew on OSHA 1926 Subpart O backing requirements before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926 Subpart O requires a spotter or equivalent means of ensuring no one is behind backing equipment, especially critical near a trench where limited visibility and edge stability create serious struck-by and collapse hazards. Operating without a spotter is a non-compliant shortcut, not acceptable journeyman practice.",
  "references": ["OSHA 1926.601(b)(4)", "OSHA 1926 Subpart O - Motor Vehicles, Mechanized Equipment, and Marine Operations"]
}
